description: As a Business Intelligence Analyst, create a segment comparison analysis in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. Create two calculated measures: 'Corporate Revenue' (CASE WHEN "Customer Segment" = 'Corporate' THEN "Revenue" ELSE 0 END) and 'Consumer Revenue' (CASE WHEN "Customer Segment" = 'Consumer' THEN "Revenue" ELSE 0 END). Generate a Grouped Bar Chart comparing these measures by 'Product Category' with the title 'Corporate vs Consumer Revenue by Product Category'. Save the workbook as 'segment_comparison.dva' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.

metadata.chart_title: Corporate vs Consumer Revenue by Product Category
